subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-10-28
subcodes.first_line: In the time of the Blessed Beauty the kitchen was in the opposite corner and as the hole of the chimney was torturous, the house was always filled with smoke. This high ceiling was black with soot.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این محل مطبخ بود دود جمال مبارک را صدمه میزد من تغییر دادم بیست سال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @suffering and imprisonment, @growth of the Cause
